name: open_meteo_air_quality
description: Real-time air quality (AQI, PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, O3) for any Indian location. Free, no API key.
contextual_description: Air quality monitoring for Indian cities. Returns AQI (US EPA standard), PM2.5, PM10, NO2, SO2, and O3 concentrations. Useful for health advisories and pollution queries.
